perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a graphic title screen for 'Costco Wholesale' featuring a cartoon character and dates 04/21-04/27. (2) A rapid series of shots follows, each showcasing a different product on Costco warehouse shelves or inside refrigeration units. (3) The camera moves quickly through various aisles, focusing on items like meat, snacks, beverages, household goods, and small appliances. (4) For each item, the creator's hand is sometimes visible pointing at or touching the product. (5) In the background, other shoppers and store staff are occasionally visible as blurry figures moving through the large warehouse environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-energy electronic background music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male narrator speaks in Mandarin with an energetic and fast-paced tone, announcing each product name and its discounted price. (3) The narration is perfectly synced with the rapid visual transitions, creating a rhythmic flow. (4) There is a subtle layer of warehouse ambient noise, though the music and voiceover remain the primary audio elements.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Main Hook: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 好市多 每週特價速報 04/21~04/27 記得追蹤我們' with an energetic tone. (2) Functional Text: Each product has a large overlay showing 'Product Name', 'Original Price', 'Discount Amount', and 'Sale Price' (e.g., '美國特選 無骨牛小排燒烤片 原價1479/KG -139 特價1340/KG'). (3) Most text uses bright yellow, red, and white colors to stand out against the background.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Continuous rapid-fire product discount showcase

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 hand of the main creator shown periodically, at least 4 blurry shoppers/staff in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator is only represented by their hand; shoppers in background are in casual attire.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco Wholesale warehouse featuring tall pallet racks, refrigeration units, wide concrete aisles, and numerous bulk-packaged items.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional digest designed to quickly inform viewers of the weekly discounts available at Costco Wholesale in Taiwan for the period of April 21 to April 27. It uses high-energy audio and rapid editing to maintain viewer engagement while presenting a large volume of deals across various consumer categories.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of store prices, membership branding, and promotional sale labels.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced rhythmic editing synced to price announcements and background music.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This is a typical 'deal-hunting' or 'shopping guide' short video common on social media platforms like TikTok or Instagram Reels, optimized for fast consumption and information density.
